response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with a focus on testability and real-time data, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, direct fintech infrastructure expertise, or proven production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments. His background in AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven systems is promising but requires deeper validation.
strengths: Strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling and frameworks (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq, agentic workflows).
Proven ability to build scalable, testable systems with observability (e.g., open-source contributions, TDD/DevOps practices).
concerns: No explicit CTO-level leadership experience; roles are primarily individual contributor or senior developer.
Limited direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or high-stakes AI deployments).
Multi-agent AI experience appears experimental (e.g., GISCollective) rather than production-grade in regulated environments.
